CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISNULL(Order_Date__c )) , TEXT(MONTH(Order_Date__c - (WEEKDAY(Order_Date__c ) - 1))) + "/" + TEXT(DAY(Order_Date__c - (WEEKDAY(Order_Date__c ) - 1))) + "/" + TEXT(YEAR(Order_Date__c - (WEEKDAY(Order_Date__c ) - 1)))+' To '+ TEXT(MONTH(Order_Date__c + (7 - WEEKDAY(Order_Date__c )))) + "/" + TEXT(DAY(Order_Date__c + (7 - WEEKDAY(Order_Date__c )))) + "/" + TEXT(YEAR(Order_Date__c + (7 - WEEKDAY(Order_Date__c )))),"" )
CustomField.label: Scheduling Range
